title: Cheese Straws
excerpt: Ingredients 500 ml flour 500 ml strong cheese 190 ml butter 5 ml baking powder 2,5 ml cayenne pepper 2,5 ml salt 125 ml cold water small bit of extra flour Method Mix all the ingredients well together, except the water and extra flour. If needed, add drops of water gradually until the …
html:
Ingredients

  • 500 ml flour
  • 500 ml strong cheese
  • 190 ml butter
  • 5 ml baking powder
  • 2,5 ml cayenne pepper
  • 2,5 ml salt
  • 125 ml cold water
  • small bit of extra flour

Method

Mix all the ingredients well together, except the water and extra flour. If needed, add drops of water gradually until the dough is very stiff.

Place the dough on a cool, floured surface and roll out to the thickness of a pencil. With a sharp knife, cut the dough into thin straws.

Give each straw one or two twists, or leave them flat – just as you like – place them on a baking tray lined with baking paper and bake in a preheated oven at 200ºC for 5 – 7 minutes or until golden brown.

Easy!
